productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Fruity Rhythm Perfume & Deo Set
description: Style Note Feminine and appealing to your sense of smell, this is a floral and fruity fragrance from ADIDAS. Long lasting, the deodorant keeps you upbeat and fresh throughout the day while the eau de toilette gives a refreshing note. Product Details Fruity Rhythm deodorant and eau de toilette Has a fruity floral fragrance Top notes are of black currant and raspberry, middle notes are of cyclamen and freesia and base note is of musk Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size ADIDAS Deo Body Spray of 150 ml ADIDAS Eau De Toilette of 50 ml
